words.meaning_en: Water that falls from clouds in drops
A mass of water vapor floating in the sky
words.example_sentence: Dark clouds appeared before the storm.
The wind blew away my kite.

An arc of colors visible in the sky after rain
words.example_sentence: We saw a beautiful rainbow after the shower.

words.example_sentence: The fog was so thick that we could not see the road.

words.meaning_en: White frozen water that falls from the sky in cold weather
words.example_sentence: The children built a snowman in the park.

words.meaning_en: The star at the center of our solar system that gives light and heat
words.example_sentence: The sun rises in the east.

words.meaning_en: A storm in which small balls of ice fall like rain
words.example_sentence: The hailstorm damaged the crops in the field.

words.meaning_en: The loud rumbling sound heard during a storm
words.example_sentence: The thunder was so loud it woke everyone up.

words.meaning_en: Covered with thick mist that makes it hard to see

A cool breeze blew through the window.

words.meaning_en: When the sky is covered with clouds
words.example_sentence: It was cloudy all day but did not rain.

words.meaning_en: How hot or cold something is, measured in degrees

words.example_sentence: It was a sunny day perfect for a picnic.
